---
title: "Exploring Storms"
author: "ethanyaozers"
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

```{r}
#| label: storms-plot
storms |>
  distinct(year, name) |>
  count(year, name="num_storms") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = num_storms)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Named Storms per Year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Number of Named Storms"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
